tasks.subject: Create FunnelController with stage CRUD
tasks.description: Implement FunnelController.php with indexStages() (FR-001/002), storeStage(), updateStage(), destroyStage() (FR-003/004).

tasks.subject: Add lead CRUD methods to FunnelController
tasks.description: Add indexLeads(), storeLead(), showLead(), updateLead(), destroyLead() per FR-005/006/007.
tasks.evidence: Added 5 lead CRUD methods + auto STAGE_CHANGE activity on stageId change

tasks.subject: Add activity methods to FunnelController
tasks.description: Add indexActivities() and storeActivity() per FR-008.

tasks.subject: Implement lead promote endpoint
tasks.description: Add promote() to FunnelController per FR-009/010/011: validate lead, create Client + CommissionRule, call PacoTicket, mark lead WON.
tasks.evidence: Added promote() with validation, Client+CommissionRule transaction, PacoTicket call, WON status

tasks.subject: Register funnel routes in index.php
tasks.description: Add 11 funnel routes to backend/public/index.php with auth middleware.
